top_items.title: Build Resilient LLM Applications on Vertex AI and Reduce 429 Errors
top_items.one_liner: Provides deeper insights into Vertex AI consumption models to effectively handle 429 errors and build resilient LLM applications.

top_items.title: Why context is the missing link in AI data security
top_items.one_liner: Explores why context is vital for AI data security, moving beyond basic controls to protect against sensitive data leaks and misuse.

top_items.title: Cloud CISO Perspectives: New Threat Horizons report highlights current cloud threats
top_items.one_liner: Shares cloud threat intelligence and analysis from the new Cloud Threat Horizons Report, relevant for CISO perspectives.
